title: Manipal Digital Health is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Manipal Digital Health is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Digital Health invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
